# o2-scalpel-smt2

Scalpel refactor MCP server for SMT-LIB 2 via smt2-lsp

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-smt2 --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `smt2-lsp` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .smt2, .smt

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply diagnostic quick-fixes (sort mismatch, syntax errors) |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
